title: Better 3D Swords
body:
# 3D Swords
## Makes sword and mace models 3D
### Now they are 3D like spyglass and trident!
This change has been needed for a long time. The heavy core is 3D, so why shouldn't the mace be 3D? 
![3d swords!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2631e60ba589cf38c83ca27f16985aacd6bb56b.png)
![3D mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ec7bbe4731f7f8ef3dde39be663dc85a0b89b5e_0.webp)
![New Models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fabb7992389319f04547f2c4b485dc3417fd768_0.webp)

Compatable with mods and other resource packs.
